marketBlend.conclusion: CONFIRMED: modelWeight≈0.15 shrinks |blended−posted| to ~15% of independent gap. Star playability (key-number differential) then selects a thin tail — not a valid apples-to-apples comparison to v2/v3-independent without a different playability criterion.

spreadToWinProb.note: Same mapping as v2 (k so +3 → ~0.60). Hand check: +3 should be ~0.60.

brier.spreadMagnitudeNote: Spread magnitude gap closed: v3 playable |modelSpread| mean 6.30 vs v2 5.22 (within 35% of v2).
brier.overconfidence: Spread magnitude gap closed: v3 playable |modelSpread| mean 6.30 vs v2 5.22 (within 35% of v2).
brier.clipExperiment: Clipping v3 spreads to ±7 improves Brier 0.2286 → 0.2279 (diagnostic only, not a fix).
brier.hypothesisA: Double-counting: team updates used full score/WEPA (QB-embedded) AND prediction added QB Elo again. Fixed by QB-neutralizing team updates (strip expected QB margin) and keeping QB only at predict time.
brier.hypothesisB: Scale: qbEloToPointDelta already uses /25 (538-style). Differentials were in point units (~4.7 pts mean |QB net|) — not raw Elo. B was not the cause of the ~2× inflation.

qbVolatility.sampleCaveat: qb-ratings-v3-sample.json only stores week 1 & 10 snapshots — per-week rates are interpolated across that gap.
qbVolatility.note: QB point deltas are not dramatically larger than team wow on this sample.

wepa.productionNote: calibrate-v3 currently feeds weekly player EPA sums into team updates — play-level weightPlay() is unit-tested but not on the live rating path.

overall: Overconfidence fix verified on spread magnitude. Re-check holdout ATS/Brier separately — closing magnitude does not guarantee beating v2.
